name: Seras Victoria

description: __Affiliations:__ Hellsing Organization, London Metropolitan Police (Former; Firearms Specialist) A policewoman sent to investigate the troubles at Cheddar Village, her squad is killed and she is nearly raped and killed by the mad vampire priest inhabiting the dead village but is "saved" when Alucard sends a bullet through her to kill the priest. name: Tsukuyo
description: Tsukuyo is a blonde-haired woman with a scar over her forehead and left cheek. One of the better known Hundred Blooms of Yoshiwara, a law enforcement squad of Yoshiwara that consists of all females, deployed by the Night King Hosen. Despite appearing to be a heartless person when approached by Odd Jobs when he arrives to Yoshiwara, throwing a fake kunai to their foreheads, she later becomes friends with them. name: Canaan
description: Canaan is the main character of the series, a mercenary currently operating in Shanghai. She was the only survivor of a village destroyed by war in the middle East before being found and trained by Siam, who has her adopting the name Canaan. She developed a mutual respect for her mentor during the course of her training, but after he was killed by Alphard, her mind is consumed by the thought of revenge and often gets serious whenever she sees Alphard. name: Lum
description: Lum is a beautiful Oni alien who is capable of flying and generating electrical shocks. She is extremely popular and is famous for ending her sentences with ~datcha (loosely translated as "yes?" or "you know?"). Except when in her school girl's uniform, she usually wears a sexy outfit consisting of a tiger-striped bikini and knee-high go-go boots. name: Kuro Nero
description: __Species:__ Anti-bird __Height:__ 8 cm An Anti-bird who decided to stay alongside Asta after encountering him at the beginning of the Magic Knights Entrance Exam. ~!It's later revealed that she is a human, her name is Secre Swallowtail. name: Vivi Nefertari
description: __Height__: 169 cm (5'6½”) __Affiliation:__ Alabasta Royal Family (temporarily; Straw Hats Pirates) __Position:__ Princess of Alabasta Nefertari Vivi first appears as a member of Baroque Works, a criminal organization that was behind several scandals in the country of Alabasta, under the alias Miss Wednesday. name: Yutaka Hoshino
description: Peco is a member of the Katase High table tennis club, along with his best friend Smile. Unlike his friend, Peco is very charismatic and has a real passion towards Ping Pong. Peco dreams of becoming the Ping Pong world champion, and claims that he'll move to Europe to start playing professionally after he graduates. ~! In the epilogue, it is revealed that Peco loves playing ping pong again and competes in competitions regularly.!~

name: Lubbock
description: Lubbock is a member of the assassin group, Night Raid. He is often shown being a pervert, including trying to peep on Leone while bathing, usually these attempts end in failure. In the city, his cover is an owner of a bookstore. name: Nicolas Brown
description: One half of Benriya, 34-year-old Nicolas is highly skilled with a sword, imposing and somewhat aloof. He is deaf and communicates primarily through sign language, though he can speak in a limited capacity. Along with Worick, Nick works as a gangster-for-hire. He is an A/O level Twilight or "tagged" (in reference to his dog tags), making him both feared and reviled on the streets. Despite his rough exterior, Nicolas has a soft spot for Nina and is beginning to accept Alex's presence at the Benriy

name: Shuumei Sasaki
description: __Height:__ 183 cm __Likes:__ Sweets Sasaki is Miyano's senior in high school. He's a 'bad-boy' who doesn't cause much trouble. He got introduced to BL manga through Miyano.

name: Aladdin
description: __Height:__ 130 cm (Initial) - 167 cm A mysterious young boy with a huge djinn within his flute. His name is based on 'Aladdin and the Magic Lamp'. He travels in search of metal vessels that contain other djinns. He has a pure and innocent, yet wise personality that dislikes fighting. Although he looks like a child, he has manly interests. He is known as a 'magi', through mediating with his staff, he can gather the magoi of rukhs for attacks. He also has the ability to materialize the djinn Ugo

name: Envy
description: __Occupation:__ Instigator for Father __Ability:__ Shapeshifting __Goal:__ Cause discord among humans Envy is a homunculus who has the ability to shapeshift. They use this power to assume the form of any person and even copy their voice. They usually serve as a spy, but their abilities are also extremely useful for assassinations. name: Akari Mizunashi
description: __Height:__ 155cm A native of Man-Home, Akari is a happy and easy-going person, who we rarely see angry or upset, a quality which she shares with her supervisor. She is best described as a romantic and seems to find enjoyment in things or events that other people might think humdrum and mundane. Akari often says "Hohe" or "Hahi", which is her short version of "wow". While she is not quite as skilled in rowing as Alice, nor is as familiar with the history of the city as Aika, her carefree and lai

name: Senko
description: __Race:__ Kitsune+ __Height:__ 135 cm (4'5") Her name is Senko, and she’s a divine messenger fox of 800 years! Her mission is to ease the anxiety and darkness plaguing humanity, and thus she has come to pamper and take care of Nakano by cooking, cleaning, and more!

name: Bond
description: Bond is the recently adopted pet of the Forger Family. Formally known as Subject 8, Bond has been used for experiments that resulted in the dog gaining precognition abilities.

name: Tomo Aizawa
description: **Relatives:** Akemi (Mother), Gorou (Father) Tomo is a high school student with a tomboyish personality, exceptional skills in combat sports, and an earnest desire to win the heart of her childhood friend Junichiro . Despite her athletic abilities, she is self-conscious about her masculine traits and seeks to become more feminine.

name: Zabuza Momochi
description: Zabuza was born in Kirigakure. During one of Kirigakure's annual events of pitting graduating ninja against each other, Zabuza singlehandedly killed all of his peers, bringing an end to the ritual and causing him to be called the "Demon of the Hidden Mist". Zabuza would go on to become one of the Seven Shinobi Swordsmen of the Mist where he acquired his zanbatō, and also became a member of the Kirigakure ANBU. name: Reisalin Stout
nativeName: ライザリン・シュタウト
description: __Height:__ 161 cm An ordinary girl whose unique characteristic is the fact that she is just that - ordinary. Ryza has a wild and tomboyish personality with a strong sense of justice. While she can be stubborn in her convictions, her heart is in the right place. Her whole world is turned upside down during an extraordinary encounter...

name: Temari
description: __Height__: 165 cm __Rank__: Genin (I); Jonin (II) Temari is the oldest child of the Fourth Kazekage, making her the older sister of Gaara and Kankuro. Temari is generally overbearing, if not crude, toward those around her, often not being afraid to speak her mind. One of the few things shown to intimidate her is her younger brother Gaara. name: Nico Yazawa
description: __Height:__ 154 cm Nico has been observing Honoka's new Idol group for a while but eventually joins them. She has past experiences as an amateur school idol. At first, she was secretly the President of the school's unknown Idol Research Club, but after an incident, the club was later joined together with Honoka's Idol Club. She likes bossing people around and acting superior, but she also has an energetic and cheeky personality.
